overall.description: A first-person exploration through a rainy, foggy industrial wasteland on the outskirts of a futuristic cyberpunk city. The scene features large illuminated holographic billboards, derelict structures, and a muddy overgrown landscape with a distant neon-lit skyline visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked industrial wasteland approach with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through muddy terrain toward illuminated billboards in the distance

entered.detail: tall vertical advertisement screen displaying a figure with a weapon
large rotating cylindrical structure with illuminated advertisements
low derelict concrete building with dark windows
metal electrical transmission towers with crisscrossing cables
futuristic city skyscrapers with glowing windows visible through rain and fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a desolate industrial zone, approaching a large circular holographic billboard and a vertical digital advertisement. The ground is muddy with sparse overgrowth, and the distant city skyline glows through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial yard alongside circular billboard structure

events.description: abandoned vehicle comes into view ahead in the muddy field

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the vertical billboard and alongside the circular structure toward industrial buildings

entered.detail: abandoned orange vehicle sitting in the overgrown mud
metal fencing running along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Moving past the vertical billboard, the camera travels alongside the massive circular holographic structure. An abandoned truck becomes visible in the muddy field ahead, with industrial buildings and power lines dominating the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial wasteland interior with derelict vehicles

events.description: circular billboard exits frame, revealing open industrial yard ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching abandoned vehicle and industrial building complex

entered.detail: two-story weathered industrial structure with illuminated windows
tall light poles casting illumination through the rain

segments.scene_description: With the circular billboard now behind, the view opens toward a derelict industrial building and abandoned vehicles. The camera continues through the rain-soaked wasteland toward the illuminated structures ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy industrial wasteland that shifts from a focus on towering holographic advertisements to a desolate landscape of derelict machinery. It begins by approaching a large circular holographic billboard and a vertical digital advertisement, with the distant city skyline glowing faintly through the haze and rain. As the camera moves past the vertical sign, the view glides alongside the massive circular hologram, revealing an abandoned truck resting in the muddy, overgrown field. The scene then opens further as the billboards recede, shifting the focus toward a cluster of derelict industrial buildings and scattered abandoned vehicles. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the rain-soaked wasteland, drawing closer to the illuminated ruins of the industrial zone.
